# Find the indices of the substring we want to return as corrected text: including both clauses
correct_sub = "وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا"

import re, unicodedata

def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(ch)!='Mn')

AR_DIACRITICS = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + '\u0670' + '\u06D6' + '\u06D7' + '\u06D8' + '\u06D9' + '\u06DA' + '\u06DB' + '\u06DC' + '\u06DF' + '\u06E0' + '\u06E1' + '\u06E2' + '\u06E3' + '\u06E4' + '\u06E7' + '\u06E8' + '\u06EA' + '\u06EB' + '\u06EC' + '\u06ED' + '\u0653' + '\u0654' + '\u0655'
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
QURAN_PUNCTS = ''.join(['\u06DD', '\u06DE', '\u06DC', '\u06DB', '\u06DA', '\u06D9', '\u06D8', '\u06D7', '\u06D6', '\u06D7', '\u06D6', '\u06D8', '\u06E9', '\u06D6','\u06D7','\u06D8','\u06D9','\u06DA','\u06DB','\u06DC','\u06DD','\u06DE','\u06DF','\u06E0','\u06E1','\u06E2','\u06E3','\u06E4','\u06E5','\u06E6','\u06E7','\u06E8','\u06EA','\u06EB','\u06EC','\u06ED'])

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = re.sub(r'['+re.escape(AR_DIACRITICS)+']', '', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation and Quranic pause marks like ۚ ۗ
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A]+', ' ', s)
    # collapse multiple spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    # if empty, handle
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    # compute overlap count
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(ta), Counter(tb)
    inter_cnt = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = inter_cnt / len(tb)  # tokens in b overlapped by a? Actually formula typical
    rec = inter_cnt / len(ta)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    # compute LCS length
    # Use dynamic programming - but for speed lengths are small
    n, m = len(a_norm), len(b_norm)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(n):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(m):
            tmp = dp[j+1]
            if a_norm[i]==b_norm[j]:
                dp[j+1] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j+1] = max(dp[j+1], dp[j])
            prev = tmp
    lcs = dp[m]
    # normalized by max length
    return lcs / max(n, m) if max(n,m)>0 else 0.0

orig_span = "نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا"
candidate1 = correct_sub
candidate2 = ayah_text
candidate3 = "وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا ۚ وَسَنَجْزِي الشَّاكِرِينَ"
print("F1 cand1:", token_f1(candidate1, orig_span), "LCS cand1:", lcs_ratio(candidate1, orig_span))
print("F1 cand2:", token_f1(candidate2, orig_span), "LCS cand2:", lcs_ratio(candidate2, orig_span))
print("F1 cand3:", token_f1(candidate3, orig_span), "LCS cand3:", lcs_ratio(candidate3, orig_span))

candidate_exact = target
# find and slice from DB to ensure match
idx = ayah_text.find(candidate_exact)
extracted = ayah_text[idx:idx+len(candidate_exact)] if idx!=-1 else None
candidate_exact_from_db = extracted
candidate_exact == candidate_exact_from_db, candidate_exact_from_db
print("F1 exact:", token_f1(candidate_exact_from_db, target), "LCS exact:", lcs_ratio(candidate_exact_from_db, target))
